keepReasons.fk_supporting: These indexes support foreign key constraints. Without them, FK cascade operations and JOINs would require sequential scans.
keepReasons.search_gin_trgm: These power the ViaConnect search engine, brand discovery, and supplement lookup features (GIN, trgm, tsvector).
keepReasons.functional_filter: These support app queries: RLS optimization, category filtering, auth flows, template lookups, event processing.

otherInfoItems.name: auth_db_connections_absolute
otherInfoItems.recommendedAction: Switch to percentage-based connection allocation in Supabase Dashboard

postLaunchPlan: Run pg_stat_reset() 30 days after launch (July 2026). Wait 30 days. Re-run advisor August 2026. Drop indexes still showing 0 scans with real traffic.
